electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 29 Hz - 200 Hz (LF limit -10 dB: 29 Hz with SB6_60/SB6_100, 32 Hz with SB6_200; upper limit set by preset to 60/100/200 Hz)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak SPL at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4: 110 dB [SB6_60], 111 dB [SB6_100], 115 dB [SB6_200]. For LA2Xi, refer to LA2Xi system spec sheet.
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional (standard configuration) over the subwoofer bandwidth
electroacoustic.components: 2 x 6.5" neodymium cone drivers (direct radiating) in a bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents laminar venting

operating_modes: passive (single amplifier output drives the enclosure)
amplification.per_amplifier_note: Values are total enclosures per controller. Per-output drive capacity: LA2Xi 1/output, LA4X 1/output, LA7.16i 1/output, LA12X 2/output.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in connection (internal pinout IN+/IN- to LF+/LF-), behind a connector sealing plate with cable glands accepting up to 2 x 2.5 mm2
connection.cabling_options: Terminal block output for LA2Xi SE / LA7.16i, or 1- and 2-channel speakON outputs via custom 2-point speakON-to-bare-wire cable (2.5 mm2)
connection.cable: 2 x 2.5 mm2 speaker cable with bare-wire endings

physical.dimensions_mm: 532 H x 360 W x 99 D (104.2 mm depth including connector/mounting detail per datasheet)
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, Pure White RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: recessed in-wall / in-ceiling / in-tile (via SB6r variants)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: 1 per SB6i-onCW (single enclosure per wall/ceiling mount; safety factor 5)
rigging_accessories: SB6i-onCW (on-wall / on-ceiling mounting interface with silent blocks, two surface-mounting plates, M6x35 Torx fasteners and safety screws)
deployment.rigging_note: 8x M6 inserts on the rear for mounting accessories and safety; rotatable front logo; replace placeholder screws in unused inserts to prevent acoustic leaks.

usage: Ultra-shallow installation subwoofer (only ~99 mm deep) intended to extend the low end of compact L-Acoustics enclosures like X4i and Soka where visual discretion or in-wall/in-ceiling integration matters.
Each SB6i needs one amplifier output channel; plan total counts per controller as 4 on LA2Xi/LA4X, 8 on LA12X, or 16 on LA7.16i (note LA12X drives 2 per output, others 1 per output).

Pick the preset by deployment: SB6_60 for subs separated from the mains (110 dB, 29 Hz LF), SB6_100 (111 dB) or SB6_200 (115 dB) for coupled placements next to the full-range boxes for higher output and crossover headroom.

Use the 8 rear M6 inserts with the SB6i-onCW accessory for on-wall or on-ceiling mounting (one enclosure per mount), or specify the SB6r recessed variants for flush in-wall/in-ceiling/in-tile integration.
Wired through a sealed 4-point push-in terminal block (up to 2.5 mm2) for permanent installs; IP55-rated cabinet allows use in protected outdoor and demanding indoor environments.
Always reinstall placeholder screws in unused rear inserts to avoid air leaks, and add pre-alignment delay from the Preset Guide when combining with line-source mains.
